# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
spec:
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: my-service
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-authz
spec:
  servers:
    - name: my-service-server
      port: 8080
      namespace: default
      serviceAccount: my-service-sa
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: another-service-authz
spec:
  servers:
    - name: another-service-server
      port: 8080
      namespace: default
      serviceAccount: another-service-sa
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-to-another-service-authz
spec:
  servers:
    - name: another-service-server
      port: 8080
      namespace: default
      serviceAccount: my-service-sa
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: another-service-to-my-service-authz
spec:
  servers:
    - name: my-service-server
      port: 8080
      namespace: default
      serviceAccount: another-service-sa
      allow: true
